subject: Build Quick Entry Component
description: Create src/components/timer/QuickEntry.tsx for manual time entry creation. Include: category selector (required), date picker for entry date, start time picker, end time picker OR duration input (toggle between modes), notes text input (optional, max 1000 chars). Validate with CreateTimeEntrySchema: end_at > start_at, duration > 0, date not in future. Show calculated duration when using start/end times. Use useCreateEntry mutation. Show success toast and clear form on submit. Handle validation errors with inline messages.
result_summary:
Verified QuickEntry.tsx implementation meets all task-025 requirements. The component was already created and committed as part of task-024 (commit 31c93dd).

**Verification of Requirements:**
1. ✅ Category selector - CategorySelector sub-component with modal picker (lines 174-295)
2. ✅ Date picker - DatePickerField with YYYY-MM-DD text input (lines 298-344)
3. ✅ Start/End time pickers - TimePickerField with HH:MM input (lines 346-393)
4. ✅ Duration input with toggle - ModeToggle switches between 'times' and 'duration' modes (lines 395-431)
5. ✅ Notes input (max 1000 chars) - Input with character counter helper text (lines 714-724)
6. ✅ CreateTimeEntrySchema validation - safeParse validation before submit (lines 602-613)
7. ✅ end_at > start_at validation - Checked in validateForm (lines 536-538)
8. ✅ duration > 0 validation - parseMinutesToSeconds returns null for invalid (lines 546-549)
9. ✅ date not in future - Checked with maxDate constraint (lines 524-529)
10. ✅ Show calculated duration - durationDisplay shows formatted duration (lines 707-712)
11. ✅ useCreateTimeEntry mutation - Imported and used (lines 42, 449)
12. ✅ Success toast - Alert.alert on success (lines 452-457)
13. ✅ Clear form on submit - resetForm() in onSuccess callback (line 460)
14. ✅ Inline validation errors - FormErrors state with error props throughout

**Technical Details:**
- 922 lines of well-documented TypeScript/React Native code
- Proper accessibility attributes (accessibilityRole, accessibilityLabel, accessibilityState)
- Dark theme styling using @/theme tokens
- Cross-platform text-based date/time pickers
- Exported from @/components/timer barrel

TypeScript passes for QuickEntry.tsx (no errors in this file).
